2605.19975.title: Learning with Foresight: Enhancing Neural Routing Policy via Multi-Node Lookahead Prediction
2605.19975.paper_summary: Neural policies have shown promise in solving vehicle routing problems due to their reduced reliance on handcrafted heuristics. However, current training paradigms suffer from a fundamental limitation: they primarily focus on next-node prediction for solution construction, resulting in myopic decision-making that undermines long-horizon planning capacity. To this end, we introduce Multi-node Lookahead Prediction (MnLP), a novel training strategy that extends the supervised learning paradigm to predict multiple future nodes simultaneously. We incorporate causal and discardable MnLP modules that operate exclusively during training, facilitating models to anticipate multi-step decisions while preserving inference-time efficiency. By incorporating multi-depth auxiliary supervision into the loss function, MnLP equips neural policies with the ability of long-range contextual understanding. Experimentally, MnLP outperforms existing training methods, improving the generalization capability of neural policies across various problem sizes, distributions, and real-world benchmarks. Moreover, MnLP can be seamlessly integrated into diverse neural architectures without introducing additional inference overhead.
2605.19975.paper_summary_zh: 神經政策在解決車輛路徑問題方面顯示出潛力，因為它們減少了對手工啟發式的依賴。<lb/>然而，當前的訓練範式存在一個根本性的限制：它們主要專注於下一節點的預測來構建解決方案，導致短視的決策，削弱了長期規劃的能力。<lb/>為此，我們提出了多節點前瞻預測（MnLP），這是一種新穎的訓練策略，擴展了監督學習範式，以同時預測多個未來節點。<lb/>我們引入了因果和可丟棄的MnLP模塊，這些模塊僅在訓練期間運作，幫助模型預測多步決策，同時保持推理時間的效率。<lb/>通過將多層次輔助監督納入損失函數，MnLP使神經政策具備長期上下文理解的能力。<lb/>實驗結果表明，MnLP優於現有的訓練方法，提高了神經政策在各種問題大小、分佈和現實世界基準上的泛化能力。<lb/>此外，MnLP可以無縫地整合到多種神經架構中，而不會引入額外的推理開銷。
2605.19975.author: Xia Jiang et.al.
2605.19975.authors: Xia Jiang, Yaoxin Wu, Yew-Soon Ong, Yingqian Zhang
